case_title: COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORP vs. BRAGG, WAYNE

docket_entries.description: RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COUNTY CREDIT CONTROL COMPANY, A CALIFORNIA CORP AS TO DEFENDANT BRAGG, WAYNE
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAGG, WAYNE $8,094.00 PRINCIPAL, $7,038.45 INTEREST, $23.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,155.45, THIS IS RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #061990. ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION, WRIT MAY BE ISSUED ON 6/1/01, IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT.
